alerts: CRITICAL: Zero organic rank for ALL tracked keywords — 100% dependent on PPC which is producing zero ad conversions
BSR STABLE AT 136,306: No change in 2 days without sales — slight improvement vs expected further decay. Baseline monitoring needed.
CAMPAIGN MANAGER BLOCKED: 8th consecutive day. PPC management impossible without access. Settlement data must serve as proxy.

OPPORTUNITIES UNTOUCHED: 'battery operated cat fountain' (SV 7,200) and 'quiet cat water fountain' (SV 4,100) still untargeted for 9+ days.
